title: The Secret Doors
description: More doors, Trapdoors & buttons made from vanilla items.
body:
![https://i.imgur.com/UbMwT9n.png](https://i.imgur.com/UbMwT9n.png)

This simple mod adds in some basic doors, trapdoors, buttons & pressure plates of the default blocks within the game, this helps you create hidden bases.


![https://i.imgur.com/Whn0krT.png](https://i.imgur.com/Whn0krT.png)
![https://i.imgur.com/I5uVnyj.png](https://i.imgur.com/I5uVnyj.png)
![https://i.imgur.com/2DpzeQD.png](https://i.imgur.com/2DpzeQD.png)

**Recipes**:
    All the recipes are the same as their vanilla counterparts apart from the the cobble stone trapdoor.
    This has one stone block in the middle top row of the recipe, this is because the wall recipes are
    the same as the trapdoor recipes. and a few others,

    Most should be on the Image tab/page  

    Or use JEI



**Q&A**:

    A: Can you update the Forge Versions or add Fabric
    B: This wouldn't be impossible to do as everyone knows both these ModLoaders are there but no I don't support Forge and I don't like Fabric, so all future
         builds after Minecraft 1.20.1 was and for now always be NeoForge, this also helps for testing as I use and play with NeoForge.

---------

    **A**: Will there be other blocks 
    **B**: Yes we will updates slowly, not every block will be added as this wouldn't make sense.

---------

    **A**: Can I use this mod within my mod pack?
    **B**: Yes it can be used in mod packs.

---------
    **A**: Can you add X for Y reasons?
    **B**: We can't add every idea but feel free to comment below and we will see what the future might hold.

---------

    **A**: Can you support Mod Block X?
    **B**: We might not support mods in this version but we might create add-ons in the future(or have done depending      on when we wrote this). but still feel free to ask in the comments.
